Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Off Calendar

Application For A Prove Up Hearing Date To Have Default Judgment Entered Against Defendants
Off Calendar Aug-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, CREDITORNS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JOHNNY CHAN, individually; MICHAEL NGAN, individually
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $42,189.31
Pre-Judgment Interest: $16,481.85
Attorney's Fees: $ to be submitted via Motion
Costs: $650.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $59,321.16
Judgment signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRIS CHAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff's claims are not barred by collateral estoppel. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
